title: What to Know About Ayatollah Ali Khamenei as His Funeral Services Begin in Iran
summary_full: Iran’s longstanding supreme leader concentrated power, presided over crackdowns and built an armed proxy network that projected influence across the Middle East.
summary_public: Iran’s longstanding supreme leader concentrated power, presided over crackdowns and built an armed proxy network that projected influence across the Middle East.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: presided over crackdowns and built an armed proxy network
